reviews.review_title: GREAT VISUALS & REALLY VERY GOOD SCARES
reviews.review_description:
I don’t know why but I love horror in VR, it scares me to death & VR does it’s well , this is no exception, the suspense is there from the start, at every corner, when you are expecting it and it still scares you.
It’s just horrifically brilliant.
What’s here is very good, it wasn’t what I expected, I thought it was going to be a proper horror story as I had never played the flat screen game. 
The endless walking around brings a new puzzle & scare, if you are a fan of horror then add this to your collection. As I say graphics are amazing.
Scare score 5/5

developer_response.body: Hey Gizmo, thanks very much for your review. We are glad that you like the adaptation and we are soo happy you like the graphics :)

reviews.review_title: It's the flat game but vr
reviews.review_description:
The visuals are good but that's where this ends. 
Evil inside vr is basically a walking simulator where you wander down the same hallway waiting for a new space to give you access. The tension of the changing atmosphere is meant to be scary, but if that doesn't do it, there are a few jump scares. 
The game is repetitive, you move way too slowly and for the price the 60 minute playtime is not worth it. 
Full review at dialognews dot ca

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you didn't enjoy it. We tried to respect the original game as much as possible, we understood the limitations of the game and try to create the best atmosphere possible to create that psicological horror.

reviews.review_title: Warning do not play at night.....
reviews.review_description: Atmosphere is where this game shines. The sound design, lighting, jump scares are all very effective. Even when I knew something was coming, it still got me. That creeping tension is what I want from a horror game and this delivers. It is a bit short though and the story is not over deep, so this is really for horror VR lovers and those that like walking around at a slow pace with a few puzzles to solve and the build-up of atmosphere and jump scares, still a great experiance.

developer_response.body: Thanks very much for your review Magic! We loved that you enjoy the game, we are trying to do as much as possible.

reviews.review_title: As a horror game, so so. Puzzle? Great!
reviews.review_description:
I came into this game fully expecting a horror thriller experience. So far, it’s mostly been repetitive jump scare tactics and teases mostly consisting of bumps in the night or doors creaking. The puzzle aspect however has been interesting but besides that, not much to interact with. Visually it actually looks great. Hopefully further into the game my experience will get better but for now, it’s been an engaging experience so far enough to keep and pursue.

Edit: I’d recommend waiting for a sale. This game was barely more than an hour! There was truly nothing unique that justifies a $14 retail

developer_response.body: We are glad the game is keeping you hook. We understand the limitations of the game, and try to make it as inmersive as possible.

reviews.review_description:
i had some issue when starting the game the first time and i was out of the scene and could not start it  
but after joining discord and showing the video's the team checkit it all out and found a way so you every time can st
art the game and and have access to the menu to start the gameplay
also some strange wall issue i have seen is now perfect.
so version 1 .067 is the updated version now.
yup not a long game but like you see in the other reviews they want to be loyal to the origal title of the game
but this make the game great to have some friends party to show a VR horrow game where new player's on VR surely will

developer_response.body: Hey McCoreBe, Thanks very much for your review and also thanks for your feedback in our discord.

reviews.review_description: Very good horror game with great visuals and puzzles! It is fun to play and try to find how things work! Not 5 stars because it have so slow movement

developer_response.body: Thanks very much for your review! We wanted to build the tension with the slow movement, but we take your feedback for next time. :)

reviews.review_description:
This had definite potential and it also had some good jump scares, but there are just too many negatives.

While the object and environment graphics are good, the character graphics are very low quality.

The intro and outro are flat screen videos which completely take you out of the immersion.

Very short (1 hour to an hour and a half.) and is not a game but a walking simulator with exactly one very easy puzzle.

Jump scares are good but that is the only thing scary.

Lastly, the story is very basic with no explanation of how or why. Usually I like stories that are obscure and leave things open to interpretation . But this is not one of those, it just feels incomplete and totally unsatisfying.

developer_response.body:
Hi greatcat, 

Sorry to hear that you didn't like some of the aspects of the game. We are glad that you enjoy the adaptation to VR. As studio, we coudn't change some of parts of the story as the intro and outro. We are working in a new game called Order 13 VR, you can check it out in the store already and wishlisted if you like :).

reviews.review_description:
Update: Thanks for the response and update on all the Achievements working! I'm excited to spend my time hunting this one at night! 👀

Really enjoying the concept so far, especially with so many twists and turns each time you maneuver the hallways. The sound design is spot on and I'm constantly on guard for the next jump scare! All Achievements are now functional!

developer_response.body: Thanks to you for playing it and giving us feedback :)

reviews.review_description:
Evil Inside VR delivers a tense psychological horror experience built around atmosphere and immersion rather than action.
The VR adaptation enhances the feeling of presence, making exploration more unsettling and personal.
With strong audio design and a slow-burning tension, it’s a solid choice for horror fans looking for a disturbing VR journey.

developer_response.body: Thanks very much!!! This makes us so happy!

developer_response.body:
Hi MJ, we would like to know more about the specific problems you are encountering. Could you join our discord so we can chat? https://discord.gg/Fr7WD4pw

Thanks!!!

reviews.review_description: I felt this game is walking around a trying to guess how to proceed.  Not really my speed.  Movement speed was too slow for me.  The graphics and atmosphere, I did enjoy.  Thank you

developer_response.body: Thanks very much for your review. We hoped you like better our next game :)
Thanks for your comment! We hope you like it :)

developer_response.body: We would love to make it longer but we had to be loyal to the original tittle Evil Inside. Stay tunned, we have another game coming up real soon, it's call Order 13 VR and you can find it in the store to wishlisht :)

reviews.review_description: The game will not start at the menu making it unplayable

developer_response.body: Hi! This is the first time we heard about this, could you join our discord to give us more details? Thanks! https://discord.gg/Fr7WD4pw

reviews.review_description:
It's a good game for people who enjoy horror. Even though the jump scares are pretty predictable, they still manage to scare you.

The sound design is really good and adds a lot to the immersion in VR, which actually made me take more than 10 minutes to solve the game's first puzzle — which is actually very simple — because I kept worrying about my surroundings, afraid that something would appear because of the atmosphere.

The story is pretty short and predictable, but that doesn't take away from its merits, because for the kind of game it is, it lasts exactly as long as it needs to. Any longer and it would probably start to feel repetitive and dragged out.

Anyway, keep in mind that the whole gameplay lasts around 1 hour, but if you're not as much of a coward as I am, you can still have fun for longer playing pool in the basement. Or you can carry the cue stick around with you to feel a false sense of protection...

developer_response.body: Thanks very much for your review! It means a lot to us that you enjoy the adaptation.

reviews.review_description: Very boring and repetitive game.  Lasted 30 mins then stopped.  Could of been so much better as the visuals quite good

developer_response.body: Hi Christopher, sorry you didn't like the story. We tried to make the adaptation the best experience possible without changing the original game. We know we had our limitations with some parts of the game, we are glad you like the visuals :).
